features.title: 调整assistant消息的消息气泡样式
features.user_visible_behavior: 调整assistant消息的消息气泡样式，使其能和user的消息作出一定的区分
verification: assistant消息气泡样式和user消息气泡样式不同
ui设计符合规范，整体色彩基调统一
单元测试，集成测试，e2e测试通过
evidence: Enhanced .chat-message.assistant .chat-message-bubble styling with distinct visual treatment:
- Background changed to --md-surface-container-low (subtle neutral gray, #FAFBFC light / #121A2E dark) vs user's --md-primary-container (blue tone)
- Left accent border: 3px solid --md-primary (blue accent) for clear visual distinction
- Shadow reduced to --md-elevation-level-0 (flat) at rest vs user's --md-elevation-level-2, creating depth contrast
- Border-radius asymmetric (8px top-left, 12px other corners) opposite to user bubbles (12px top-left, 8px top-right)
- Hover state: elevation to level-1, left border darkens to --md-primary-dark
All color tokens used are from existing Material Design palette - no new colors introduced
Unit tests: 188/188 passed (npx jest --forceExit)
Integration tests: 23/23 passed (npm run test:integration)
E2E tests: 40/40 passed (npx playwright test --config playwright.config.js)
ESLint: 0 warnings, 0 errors (npx eslint .)
